Miu Miu embroidered logo zip-up coat and pants set, tailored in custom silk-like wool, delicate and smooth to the touch. The serene blue of the deep sea meets the steady grey of rocks, blending into a sophisticated aesthetic statement of restraint. The iconic same-color Miu Miu embroidered logo adorns the chest, subtly hinting at a distinguished identity. Deconstructing the street-style zip-up silhouette, it presents an architectural three-dimensional depth. The laser burning technique, using advanced laser technology to carve out the logo, ensures precise control over position and shape. Imported machine embroidery technology achieves high precision and smooth lines for the logo embroidery, with the fabric sand-washed for better texture, shape retention, and colorfastness. The straight and delicate stitching, comfortable and soft fabric, consistent color matching make it versatile for various occasions, with customized accessories and unisex sizing from S to XL.
